---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report maintenance or housekeeping tasks
title: "Maintenance: "
labels: maintenance
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

## Scope
Explain the scope of the maintenance work (e.g., which files, modules, or systems are affected).

## Proposed Changes
Describe the specific changes you plan to make (e.g., refactoring, dependency updates, cleanup).

## Impact
Explain the potential impact of this maintenance work (e.g., performance improvements, reduced technical debt).
